en: Four dozen juicy buffalo wings for only $39.99.
And if your party's really raging, go for two with Wing-Pit's tailgate feast.
Twenty dozen wings, five ethnically troubling sauces like Asian Zing and Jamaican Me Spicy.
Plus a gallon of ranch for just $89.99.
Awesome, thank you. We're probably good on wings though.
But you could be great on wings with Wing-Pit's new tray of tears.
ko: 하지만 윙핏의 새로운 눈물의 쟁반으로 윙을 더 즐길 수 있어요.

en: 600 of our succulent wings plus 15 butt-destroying sauces and a kiddie pool of ranch for only $205.99.
There's only like 15 people here. We don't need all that.
ko: 여기 사람은 15명 정도밖에 없어요. 그건 필요 없어요.

en: But you want it, just like you want Wing-Pit's hard slurry chicken smoothie.
ko: 하지만 당신은 원하잖아요, 윙핏의 하드 슬러리 치킨 스무디처럼요.

en: It's 40 liquefied wings mixed with 80 proof green alcohol.
ko: 40개의 액체화된 윙과 80도 그린 알코올이 섞여 있어요.

en: Must be over 12 to order. Over 12?
And if you're thirsty for more, try Wing-Pit's new chicken garbage platter.
3,000 tangy wings packed in a black contractor bag.
ko: 3,000개의 매콤한 윙이 검은 계약자 가방에 담겨.

en: Throw them straight through your window and time for kickoff.
ko: 당신의 창문을 뚫고 바로 킥오프 시간이에요.
